title: Watch: Iranian missile strikes Jerusalem near Al-Aqsa mosque during Eid prayers
summary_full: Jerusalem's Old City experienced a fragment of an Iranian ballistic missile landing near its holiest sites during Eid al-Fitr. While Israel's air defense intercepted the main threat, debris impacted a parking lot close to the Western Wall and Al-Aqsa Mosque. This incident, occurring amidst escalating regional tensions, highlights Iran's alleged indiscriminate missile fire, as confirmed by the IDF.
